subject: 20% tariff on Indian pharmaceutical chemicals
claim_text: The US proposed a 20% tariff on pharmaceutical chemicals and active ingredients from India.

subject: India machinery tariff law enacted at 18%
claim_text: Congress passed law imposing 18% tariff on industrial machinery imports from India.

subject: Mexico steel and aluminum tariff pause extended
claim_text: The USTR extended the tariff pause on Mexican steel and aluminum imports for 60 days.

subject: China tariff pause on garments suspended
claim_text: The 90-day pause on Chinese garment tariffs has been suspended pending review.

subject: 25% tariff on Mexican auto parts under IEEPA
claim_text: White House confirmed 25% tariff on auto parts and vehicle components from Mexico under IEEPA authority.

subject: 46% tariff proposed on Vietnamese footwear
claim_text: The administration is proposing a 46% tariff on footwear and shoes imported from Vietnam.

subject: Vietnam textile tariff increase 28% announced
claim_text: Administration announced 28% tariff on Vietnamese textile and fabric imports, effective June 1.
